nodes.name: discussion-audit.js
nodes.summary: CLI script that audits GitHub discussions across one or more repos, checking for maintainer-touch gaps and missing accepted answers, then renders the results as text, JSON, or Markdown.

nodes.name: github-discussions.js
nodes.summary: Library module providing GitHub Discussions data access via the gh CLI, including functions to fetch discussion summaries, evaluate maintainer-touch and accepted-answer status, and summarize individual discussions.

nodes.name: operator-readiness-dashboard.js
nodes.summary: Large CLI script that generates an ECC operator readiness dashboard by evaluating dozens of artifact-level requirements (roadmap tracking, supply chain, linear progress, agent-shield, legacy salvage) against local repo files and live GitHub data, then renders a structured report.
nodes.languageNotes: At 1057 non-empty lines with 40 functions, this is the most complex single script in the batch; buildRequirements alone spans 345 lines and calls 20+ helper functions.

nodes.name: platform-audit.js
nodes.summary: CLI script and library providing platform-level readiness checks including git working-tree inspection, GitHub PR/issue queue fetching, local evidence checks, and structured report rendering in text, JSON, or Markdown.

nodes.name: parseArgs
nodes.summary: Parses argv to produce a validated options object including format, write path, repos list, first-n, and flag settings for the discussion audit CLI.

nodes.name: buildReport
nodes.summary: Fetches discussion summaries for all configured repos and aggregates them into a structured audit report object with per-repo breakdowns, totals, and pass/fail checks.

nodes.name: renderText
nodes.summary: Serializes an audit report to a human-readable plain-text format with per-check status lines and summary counts.

nodes.name: renderMarkdown
nodes.summary: Serializes an audit report to a Markdown table format, escaping pipe characters in cell values.

nodes.name: renderReport
nodes.summary: Dispatches rendering to the appropriate format handler (JSON, Markdown, or text) based on the format option.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Top-level async entry point: parses args, builds the discussion audit report, renders output, optionally writes to file, and exits with code 2 when checks fail and --exit-code is set.

nodes.name: runCommand
nodes.summary: Executes a shell command synchronously via spawnSync, throws on non-zero exit or stderr output, and returns trimmed stdout.

nodes.name: runGhJson
nodes.summary: Invokes the gh CLI with the provided args and parses the JSON response, throwing a descriptive error on parse failure.

nodes.name: discussionNeedsMaintainerTouch
nodes.summary: Returns true when a discussion was not opened by a maintainer and has no maintainer comment, using an allowlist of MAINTAINER_ASSOCIATIONS.

nodes.name: fetchDiscussionSummary
nodes.summary: Fetches a paginated list of GitHub discussions for a repo via GraphQL through gh, filters them for maintainer-touch and accepted-answer gaps, and returns a structured summary object.

nodes.name: parseArgs
nodes.summary: Parses argv for the operator-readiness-dashboard CLI, supporting format, write path, root dir, repos, budget flags, allow-untracked paths, and generated-at override.

nodes.name: buildRequirements
nodes.summary: Evaluates all operator-readiness requirements by reading local repo artifacts and the platform report, producing a flat array of requirement objects with status, evidence, and gap fields.

nodes.name: buildReport
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the full dashboard report build: resolves paths, collects platform report, evaluates requirements, determines readiness, and assembles the final report object.

nodes.name: eccToolsNextLevelEvidence
nodes.summary: Scans the roadmap text for evidence of ECC next-level tools across multiple feature groups (marketplace, agents, skills, commands, hooks), returning a summary string.

nodes.name: eccToolsNextLevelGap
nodes.summary: Identifies gaps in ECC next-level tools coverage by checking which feature groups are missing from the roadmap and returns a descriptive gap string.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point for the operator-readiness-dashboard CLI: parses args, builds and renders the report, optionally writes output, and exits with code 2 on unreadiness when --exit-code is set.

nodes.name: parseArgs
nodes.summary: Parses argv for the platform-audit CLI supporting format, write path, root dir, repos, PR/issue/dirty-file budgets, allow-untracked paths, and skip-github flag.

nodes.name: inspectGit
nodes.summary: Runs git status on the repo root and returns parsed branch name, dirty file lines, and counts of blocking untracked/modified files.

nodes.name: fetchGithubRepo
nodes.summary: Fetches open PRs, open issues, and discussion summaries for a single GitHub repo using the gh CLI, returning a per-repo data object.

nodes.name: buildGithubReport
nodes.summary: Collects GitHub queue and discussion data for all configured repos, aggregates per-repo reports, and returns a combined GitHub status object.

nodes.name: buildLocalEvidenceChecks
nodes.summary: Reads local repo artifact files and returns an array of check objects evaluating the presence and content of CHANGELOG, README, CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY, and other required files.

nodes.name: buildReport
nodes.summary: Assembles the full platform audit report by combining git inspection, GitHub repo data, and local evidence checks into a unified check list with overall pass/fail status.

nodes.name: renderMarkdown
nodes.summary: Renders the platform audit report as a Markdown document with a summary header, a status table with emoji indicators per check, and a failures section.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Top-level async entry point for platform-audit CLI: parses args, builds report, renders output, optionally writes to file, and exits with code 2 on failure when --exit-code is set.
